final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from the Legend of Sword and Fairy IP, designed as a social media character showcase asset.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar style
Composition: 3x3 grid layout, 9 equal panels, each panel showing character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses (Zhao Ling'er inspired)
Scene/backdrop: white paper background with torn circular holes framing each expression panel
Lighting/mood: bright, cheerful, studio lighting suitable for character expression showcase
Color palette: vibrant outfit colors — green, red, yellow, black and white stripes, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal
Materials/textures: 3D rendered character, soft fabric textures for sweaters/jackets, glossy paper tear edges
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 9 distinct expressions and outfits as specified, consistent character base across all panels, torn paper framing maintained throughout grid
Avoid: realistic photographic style, anime/manga aesthetic, dark or moody lighting
